name: RoboForex Championship
rules: Monthly championship on real accounts. Entry fee: 1 standard lot traded. Top 10 traders ranked by ROI share the prize pool. Prizes range from $100 to $2,000.

name: FBS Million Dollar
rules: Annual mega-contest with $1,000,000 in total prize money. All registered clients eligible. Monthly qualifying rounds feed into annual finals. Top 100 traders receive prizes.

name: LiteFinance
rules:
1. Register a new live account.
2. Pass standard KYC verification.
3. Bonus credited within 24 hours.
4. Trade 3 lots to unlock withdrawal of profits.
